author: misilva73
content: Ok, so it seems like we should still make changes for the place where we are charging account creation, but we will need different handling for CALLs and CREATEs. Is this correct?

author: garyrong
content: I guess so. there are a few alternatives, one raised by Toni is to charge the state creation after the child-frame. I need to sit down and evaluate the alternatives before saying something

author: garyrong
content: But one thing is for sure, we can't move the state charging for account-creation inside of the child CALL frame for backward compatibility

author: lu_pinto
content: yes I think the charge for CREATE is wrong right now as it OOGs the caller. I mean you can do it in the caller, as long as you return 0 for CREATE. Most likely, clients will optimize for that.
